zh.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn於大約1318年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。他於1344年與verch Rhys在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn于大约1318年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。他于1344年与verch Rhys在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Aydan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the ancient Gaelic name Áedán . The name was borne by various early Irish saints, notably an Irish disciple (  d. 626 ) of  St David of Wales , who later became bishop of Ferns and was noted for his kindness and generosity, and the one (  d. 651 ) who brought Christianity to the English settlers of 7th-century Northumbria, founding the monastery on the island of Lindisfarne. The name was revived in the 20th century, in particular during the last couple of decades, by parents conscious of their Irish or Scottish ancestry and has also acquired considerable popularity among those without such connections.

variants.name: Aiden
meanings: Anglicized form of the ancient Gaelic name Áedán . The name was borne by various early Irish saints, notably an Irish disciple (  d. 626 ) of  St David of Wales , who later became bishop of Ferns and was noted for his kindness and generosity, and the one (  d. 651 ) who brought Christianity to the English settlers of 7th-century Northumbria, founding the monastery on the island of Lindisfarne. The name was revived in the 20th century, in particular during the last couple of decades, by parents conscious of their Irish or Scottish ancestry and has also acquired considerable popularity among those without such connections.

variants.name: Edan
meanings: Variant of   Aidan .   St Edan  was an Irish disciple of David of Wales, who later became bishop of Ferns.

en.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn was born about 1318, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. He married verch Rhys in 1344, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn est né environ 1318, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé verch Rhys en 1344, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn wurde um 1318 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1344 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom verch Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn è nato il circa 1318 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Lui sposato verch Rhys nel 1344, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelynは約1318年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた。1344年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでverch Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn(은)는 대략 1318년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났다. 그는 1344년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 verch Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com verch Rhys em 1344, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn родился около 1318 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени verch Rhys в 1344 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Aydan Ap Llewelyn nació aproximadamente 1318, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Se casó con verch Rhys en 1344, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
